comment: FiberQuality behavior on vanilla flax fibers — quality tooltip on all fiber types
DurabilityBonus behavior on linen armor — fine cord recipes grant durability upgrades
Switch reedpapyrus to BlockReedsWithSpread so the spread behavior gets ticked
All reedpapyrus variants (coopersreed, papyrus, tule, brownsedge) spread via rhizome. The behavior auto-detects water vs soil from each variant's 'habitat' key and spreads as the same block variant.
